name: Combobox
description: Create custom select, autocomplete or multiselect inputs
searchText: combobox create custom select, autocomplete or multiselect inputs @mantine/core /core/combobox arrowoffset arrowposition arrowradius arrowsize children disabled dropdownpadding floatingstrategy hidedetached keepmounted middlewares offset onclose ondismiss onentertransitionend onexittransitionend onopen onoptionsubmit onpositionchange overlayprops portalprops position preventpositionchangewhenvisible radius readonly resetselectiononoptionhover returnfocus shadow size store transitionprops width witharrow withoverlay withinportal zindex active disabled selected value autocomplete children refprop targettype withariaattributes withexpandedattribute withkeyboardnavigation children refprop autocomplete children refprop targettype withariaattributes withexpandedattribute withkeyboardnavigation hidden label

props.name: arrowOffset
props.description: Arrow offset in px

props.name: arrowPosition
props.description: Arrow position

props.name: arrowRadius
props.description: Arrow border-radius in px

props.name: arrowSize
props.description: Arrow size in px

props.name: children
props.description: Combobox content

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set, popover dropdown will not be rendered

props.name: dropdownPadding
props.description: Controls padding of the dropdown

props.name: floatingStrategy
props.description: Changes floating ui [position strategy](https://floating-ui.com/docs/usefloating#strategy)

props.name: hideDetached
props.description: If set, the dropdown is hidden when the element is hidden with styles or not visible on the screen

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: If set, the dropdown is not unmounted from the DOM when hidden. display: none styles are added instead.

props.name: middlewares
props.description: Floating ui middlewares to configure position handling
props.defaultValue: { flip: true, shift: true, inline: false }

props.name: offset
props.description: Offset of the dropdown element

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when dropdown closes

props.name: onDismiss
props.description: Called when the popover is dismissed by clicking outside or by pressing escape

props.name: onEnterTransitionEnd
props.description: Called when enter transition ends

props.name: onExitTransitionEnd
props.description: Called when exit transition ends

props.name: onOpen
props.description: Called when dropdown opens

props.name: onOptionSubmit
props.description: Called when item is selected with the Enter key or by clicking it

props.name: onPositionChange
props.description: Called when dropdown position changes

props.name: overlayProps
props.description: Props passed down to Overlay component

props.name: portalProps
props.description: Props to pass down to the Portal when withinPortal is true

props.name: position
props.description: Dropdown position relative to the target element

props.name: preventPositionChangeWhenVisible
props.description: Prevents popover from flipping/shifting when it the dropdown is visible

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Determines whether the Combobox value can be changed

props.name: resetSelectionOnOptionHover
props.description: Determines whether selection should be reset when option is hovered

props.name: returnFocus
props.description: Determines whether focus should be automatically returned to control when dropdown closes

props.name: shadow
props.description: Key of theme.shadows or any other valid CSS box-shadow value

props.name: size
props.description: Controls items font-size and padding

props.name: store
props.description: Combobox store, can be used to control combobox state

props.name: transitionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Transition component. Use to configure duration and animation type.

props.name: width
props.description: Dropdown width, or 'target' to make dropdown width the same as target element

props.name: withArrow
props.description: Determines whether component should have an arrow

props.name: withOverlay
props.description: Determines whether the overlay should be displayed when the dropdown is opened

props.name: withinPortal
props.description: Determines whether dropdown should be rendered within the Portal

props.name: zIndex
props.description: Dropdown z-index

props.name: active
props.description: Current active state

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disabled state

props.name: selected
props.description: Current selected state

props.name: value
props.description: Option value

props.name: autoComplete
props.description: Input autocomplete attribute

props.name: children
props.description: Target element

props.name: refProp
props.description: Key of the prop that is used to access element ref

props.name: targetType
props.description: Determines which events is handled by the target element. button target type handles Space and Enter keys to toggle dropdown opened state.

props.name: withAriaAttributes
props.description: If set, the target has aria- attributes

props.name: withExpandedAttribute
props.description: If set, the target has aria-expanded attribute

props.name: withKeyboardNavigation
props.description: If set, the component responds to keyboard events

props.name: children
props.description: Target element

props.name: refProp
props.description: Key of the prop that should be used to access element ref

props.name: autoComplete
props.description: Input autocomplete attribute

props.name: children
props.description: Target element

props.name: refProp
props.description: Key of the prop is used to access element ref

props.name: targetType
props.description: Determines which events should be handled by the target element. button target type handles Space and Enter keys to toggle dropdown opened state.

props.name: withAriaAttributes
props.description: If set, the target has aria- attributes

props.name: withExpandedAttribute
props.description: If set, the target has aria-expanded attribute

props.name: withKeyboardNavigation
props.description: If set, the component responds to the keyboard events

props.name: hidden
props.description: Determines whether the dropdown should be hidden, for example, when there are no options to display

props.name: label
props.description: Group label
